title: DeepSwapAI controlled image input-readiness benchmark
alternateName: DeepSwapAI face swap input readiness dataset
description: A reproducible input-only image benchmark measuring resolution, luminance, contrast, clipping, and edge detail across six controlled variants without claiming face swap output quality.
creator: DeepSwapAI Product Team
attribution: DeepSwapAI Controlled Image Input-Readiness Benchmark v1, https://deepswapai.com/research
rights: The JSON and CSV data, transformations, formulas, and measurement metadata are licensed under CC BY 4.0. Referenced sample images remain DeepSwapAI-owned and are provided for benchmark verification; they are not relicensed for unrelated reuse.

source.rights: DeepSwapAI-owned product creative used as a controlled input source.

analyzer.luminance: Rec. 709 luma: 0.2126R + 0.7152G + 0.0722B after compositing transparency over white.
analyzer.contrast: Population standard deviation of sampled luminance.
analyzer.darkClipping: Percentage of sampled pixels with luminance less than or equal to 10.
analyzer.highlightClipping: Percentage of sampled pixels with luminance greater than or equal to 245.
analyzer.edgeDetail: Mean absolute luminance difference across every horizontal and vertical adjacent-pixel pair.

scope: Input-image measurements only. No face swap generation was run for this dataset.
limitations: The dataset uses one owned source scene and controlled variants; it is not representative of every face, camera, or lighting condition.
The measurements do not detect a face, identity, consent, pose, expression, occlusion, hair, or gaze.
The measurements do not predict output realism, identity similarity, model accuracy, processing success, or preference.
Compression and resizing can change measurements across browser decoders by small amounts.

samples.label: Reference encode
samples.transformation: Resize the owned source to 960 x 540 and encode as WebP at quality 82.

samples.label: Reduced resolution
samples.transformation: Resize the same source to 320 x 180 and encode as WebP at quality 82.

samples.label: Soft focus
samples.transformation: Resize to 960 x 540, apply a Gaussian blur with sigma 4.5, and encode as WebP at quality 82.

samples.label: Low exposure
samples.transformation: Resize to 960 x 540, apply y = 0.52x - 8 to RGB channels, clamp to 8-bit range, and encode as WebP at quality 82.

samples.label: High exposure
samples.transformation: Resize to 960 x 540, apply y = 1.35x + 45 to RGB channels, clamp to 8-bit range, and encode as WebP at quality 82.

samples.label: Heavy JPEG compression
samples.transformation: Resize to 960 x 540 and encode as JPEG at quality 15 with 4:2:0 chroma subsampling.
